root_cause.summary: pytest fails collection and many runtime tests because NumPy (nightly) now raises DeprecationWarning when constructing np.datetime64 values with the 'generic' timedelta unit, and pandas' warning-as-error configuration turns this into test failures. The fix belongs on pandas' side: update affected tests/implementations to use a specific timedelta unit, or adjust the warning filter.

required_signals.value: DeprecationWarning: The 'generic' unit for NumPy timedelta is deprecated
= 45 failed, 162298 passed, 25570 skipped, 701 xfailed, 52 errors in 759.43s

evidence_spans.reason: First pytest collection ERROR block with the canonical traceback and the DeprecationWarning that triggers every failure.
pytest short test summary info header plus first FAILED entries showing the same DeprecationWarning is the common root cause across tests.
Final aggregated counts (45 failed, 52 errors) and the GHA exit-code marker.
